title: cerastium lanceolatum
intro: Cerastium lanceolatum, also known as Lance-leaf Mouse-Ear or Lance-leaf Snow-in-Summer, is a perennial flowering plant in the carnation family (Caryophyllaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Cerastium lanceolatum include its potential to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
